name: dance3_loop
note: 'Hey! Boogie woogie bang bang' finger-pointing groove dance (from a Pokemon Day fan animation), 16-frame seamless loop @12FPS. Rules for EVERY frame: both hands are ALWAYS in a cute finger-point shape — index finger extended, the other fingers curled into a loose fist, like a playful finger-gun. FEET: planted in a WIDE stance, clearly wider than her shoulders, toes turned slightly outward, and they NEVER leave their spot — no steps, no jump; the groove shows only as knee softening, heel lifts and hip sways. The signature motion: the torso and head tilt to one side while BOTH index fingers point toward that SAME side (the near-side arm extended out at shoulder height, the other hand held in front of the chest pointing the same way) and the hips push the OPPOSITE side; two bounces per side. Then facing center both index fingers point UP-outward at ear height twice (hey! hey!). Cycle: 0 center dip -> 1-4 sway to image-LEFT with two bounces -> 5-6 back through center -> 7-10 sway to image-RIGHT with two bounces (mirror) -> 11 back to center -> 12-15 two upward double-points -> loop.
frames: Pose: doing a groovy finger-pointing boogie dance, body at the LOWEST point of a gentle bounce: standing facing forward, feet planted in a WIDE stance clearly wider than her shoulders, toes turned slightly outward, knees slightly softened. Both hands in a cute finger-point shape (index finger out, other fingers curled), held in front of her chest at collarbone height, elbows bent and tucked near her sides, both index fingers pointing diagonally upward-outward. Torso and head centered, upright. Big joyful open-mouth grin, sparkling eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a groovy finger-pointing boogie dance, rising out of the dip and starting to sway: torso and head beginning to tilt toward the LEFT side of the image, both finger-point hands (index fingers out) starting to sweep toward the LEFT side of the image at chest height, elbows still bent. Her hips shift slightly toward the RIGHT side of the image, opposite her upper body. Feet stay planted in a wide stance, knees easing. Big open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a groovy finger-pointing boogie dance at the TOP of the bounce, fully swayed to one side: torso and head clearly tilted toward the LEFT side of the image like a banana curve, NOT standing straight. The arm on the LEFT side of the image is extended out toward the LEFT at shoulder height, its index finger pointing sideways-up toward the upper-left of the image; the other hand is held in front of her chest, its index finger ALSO pointing toward the LEFT side of the image. Her hips push clearly toward the RIGHT side of the image, opposite her shoulders, making a cute S-curve. Heels slightly lifted, feet still planted in a wide stance, no jump. Blonde hair swinging toward the left side of the image. Huge open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy arcs. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a groovy finger-pointing boogie dance, holding the same swayed position but at the BOTTOM of a bounce: torso and head still tilted toward the LEFT side of the image, the left-side arm still pointing toward the LEFT but dropped to chest height, the other hand in front of her chest pointing the same way. Hips still pushed toward the RIGHT side of the image. Knees bent a little deeper so the whole body sits slightly lower, heels flat on the ground, feet planted in a wide stance — NOT a squat. Big open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a groovy finger-pointing boogie dance, bouncing UP a second time while still swayed to the same side: torso and head tilted toward the LEFT side of the image, the left-side arm extended out toward the LEFT at shoulder height with the index finger pointing sideways-up, the other hand in front of her chest pointing the same way. Hips pushed toward the RIGHT side of the image. Body at its tallest, heels slightly lifted, feet planted in a wide stance, no jump. Blonde hair bouncing toward the left side of the image. Huge joyful open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy arcs, cheeks flushed. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a groovy finger-pointing boogie dance, swinging back from the side toward the middle: torso and head easing back toward center with only a slight leftover tilt toward the LEFT side of the image, both finger-point hands sweeping back toward the middle, currently in front of her chest between the left side and center at collarbone height, elbows bent. Hips easing back under her shoulders. Body sinking slightly, knees softening, feet planted in a wide stance. Big open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes. Pose: doing a groovy finger-pointing boogie dance, the first cheerful upward double-point (hey!): standing centered facing forward, feet planted in a wide stance, body upright at normal height. BOTH arms raised with elbows bent, one hand on each side of her head at ear height, both index fingers pointing UP and slightly outward like a disco 'hey!', hands never directly above the top of her head, arms never fully straightened. Big open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Both finger-point hands pulled back in front of her chest at collarbone height, elbows bent and tucked near her sides, index fingers pointing diagonally upward-outward. Torso and head centered. Big joyful open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
